title: Moderation update: spam, harassment, and a false-positive report
body: We reviewed today's high-severity reports and took action on the validated cases. spam_wave_42 was banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels, and toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. We also closed a brigading-driven false-positive report involving core_maintainer after review. The moderation team will keep responding quickly to abuse while checking reports carefully to avoid overcorrecting.
